scripts.build:chrome: npm run typecheck && vite build --mode chrome && node scripts/prepare-manifest.mjs chrome
scripts.build:firefox: npm run typecheck && vite build --mode firefox && node scripts/prepare-manifest.mjs firefox
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.zip:all: npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:firefox
scripts.release:chrome: npm run build:chrome && npm run zip:chrome
scripts.release:firefox: npm run build:firefox && npm run zip:firefox
scripts.release:all: npm run build:all && npm run zip:all
scripts.dev:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.web-ext:build: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
